rankings.reason: Best alignment with the prompt, offering a creative, multisensory, and immersive vision of a 2050 airport experience.
Strong focus on functional futuristic technology, though it lacks the creative narrative flair of the top option.
Includes a narrative, but the hoverboard and drone elements feel less professional and more chaotic than others.
Fails to provide the required story and slogans, focusing instead on generic airport operational advice.
